pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py as the target output file.
Found in setup_task.sh as the destination for copying the sample project.
Found in verifier.py where coverage >= min_coverage (0.75 by default) is required to pass.
Not found in any script. The sample project contains 146 tasks, but this parameter is ignored by the verifier.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real Microsoft Project sample file ('Commercial Construction', 146 tasks) copied to '/home/ga/Projects/enterprise_project.xml'. The verifier checks that the output file is saved to '/home/ga/Projects/baseline_project.xml' and that at least 75% of the tasks have baseline data in the XML. The VLM verifier also inspects trajectory screenshots to confirm the 'Set Baseline' dialog was opened. The 'min_tasks_count' parameter is unused.
